items.title: Is NuScale Power Stock a Buy Now?
items.author: Motley Fool
items.description: Nuclear power is gaining favor as a clean, reliable energy source to help companies meet carbon reduction goals. Small modular reactors (SMRs) from NuScale Power represent a groundbreaking advancement in the nuclear energy sector, offering a modular and scalable solution. However, NuScale faces challenges with cost overruns and regulatory approvals before its technology can be operational.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: NuScale Power is developing promising small modular reactor technology, but it faces significant challenges with cost overruns and regulatory approvals before its technology can be operational. The article presents a balanced view, highlighting both the potential of NuScale's technology and the risks and uncertainties it faces.
The article mentions that Alphabet has announced investments in start-ups developing small modular reactors, indicating the company's interest in and support for this clean energy technology.

The article states that Amazon has also announced investments in start-ups developing small modular reactors, suggesting the company's commitment to exploring clean energy solutions for its data centers.
